message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate 4 modules to factory pattern - Phase 3 DRY

Convert constant generator functions to h.c(), h.I64(), h.U32() factories:

- termios_mod.zig: 256→60 lines (-196 lines, 41 constants)
- fcntl_mod.zig: 274→61 lines (-213 lines, 45 constants)
- select_mod.zig: 262→61 lines (-201 lines, 36 constants)
- resource_mod.zig: 166→39 lines (-127 lines, 22 constants)

Total Phase 3 savings: ~737 lines
Total DRY work savings: ~2,192 lines
